timeline.title: Primary and Secondary Schooling
timeline.subtitle: LKG to 10th | Baroda High School, Alkapuri
timeline.description: Completed primary and secondary schooling from LKG to 10th (2007–2019) at Baroda High School, Alkapuri. Graduated with 83% under GSEB board. Highly involved in NCC activities under the Indian Navy wing — selected to represent Gujarat Directorate at the Republic Day Camp (RDC) in Delhi 2018 and marched at the Prime Minister Rally after 6 months of rigorous training. Served as Head of the Computer Department at BHS Higher Secondary Section.
activities: NCC (National Cadet Corps) — Indian Navy wing, 2 Gujarat Naval Unit
Republic Day Camp (RDC) Delhi 2018
PM (Prime Minister) Rally, Cariappa Parade Ground, Delhi 2018
Head of Computer Department, BHS Alkapuri Higher Secondary Section

achievements.title: RDC Delhi 2018 — NCC Representative
achievements.description: Selected to represent Gujarat Directorate of NCC from 2 Gujarat Naval Unit after 6 months of training. Stayed with Indian Officers in Delhi, met Admiral Sunil Lanba (23rd Chief of Naval Staff), and marched at the PM Rally 2018.

achievements.title: Gujarat Best Cadet
achievements.description: Awarded Gujarat Best Cadet during NCC tenure.

timeline.title: Diploma in Computer Science
timeline.subtitle: Computer Science and Engineering | GTU
timeline.description: Completed Diploma in Computer Science from GTU (Jan 2019 – Jun 2022). Graduated as Institute Topper with 9.67 CGPA, achieving 10 SPI in both 5th and 6th semester. Built a strong foundation in programming, data structures, databases, operating systems, and computer networks. Won the Inter-College Web Development competition — had to build a project in Notepad with no internet access.
activities: Data Structures
Database Management Systems
Operating Systems
Computer Networks
Web Development
Inter-College Web Development Competition

achievements.title: Institute Topper — 1st Rank
achievements.description: Graduated as Institute Topper at GTU Diploma with 9.67 CGPA overall.

achievements.title: 10 SPI — 5th & 6th Semester
achievements.description: Achieved perfect 10 SPI in both 5th semester (Dec 2021) and 6th semester (Jun 2022).

achievements.title: Inter-College Web Development Winner
achievements.description: Won inter-college web development competition. Had to code in Notepad with no internet access — built a project under strict time constraints.

documents.label: Secured 1st rank in SPI, 32nd rank in CGPA, and 38th rank in CPI in the GTU Diploma examination, reflecting consistent academic excellence and strong overall performance.

timeline.title: Web Developer Intern
timeline.subtitle: The Sparks Foundation
timeline.description: Developed a banking website capable of performing fund transfers between accounts as part of a remote internship with The Sparks Foundation. Built using MySQL, PHP, HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap.
activities: Developed account-to-account fund transfer functionality
Built full banking UI using HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap
Integrated MySQL database for account and transaction management

achievements.title: Banking Web Application
achievements.description: Delivered a functional banking website with transfer capabilities using PHP and MySQL.

timeline.title: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.)
timeline.subtitle: Computer Science & Engineering | MSU Baroda

organization.name: The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda (MSU)

timeline.description: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science & Engineering from MSU Baroda (Sep 2022 – May 2025), graduating with 8.11 CGPA and First Class with Distinction. Worked on production-grade software throughout the degree — built ResumeeAI as a final year project during 7th and 8th semester and received Best Project recognition from the university. Founded and led Code Vimarsh, a student-led technical community at MSU, as Vice President.
activities: Backend Development & System Design
Database Management Systems
Cloud Computing
Data Structures & Algorithms
Founded and led Code Vimarsh technical community

achievements.title: 8.11 CGPA — First Class with Distinction
achievements.description: Maintained strong academic performance alongside full-time professional work and community leadership.

achievements.title: Best Final Year Project — ResumeeAI
achievements.description: ResumeeAI recognized as Best Project by The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda.

timeline.title: Android Developer Intern
timeline.subtitle: iTechNotion Private Limited
timeline.description: Built a City Directory Android application with Google Maps API integration, dynamic API-based data fetching, custom navigation components, and Material Design 3 UI. Designed UI/UX in Figma and implemented advanced splash screen with full-screen mode.

Dynamic API data fetching
Custom navigation bar implementation
Advanced splash screen with full-screen UI
Material Design 3 UI/UX design in Figma

achievements.title: City Directory Android App
achievements.description: Delivered a production-ready Android application following Material Design 3 standards with maps, navigation, and dynamic data.

timeline.title: Student Ambassador
timeline.subtitle: MSU Vision 2020
timeline.description: Served as Student Ambassador for MSU Vision 2020 at The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda. Led event coordination and execution for university-wide activities, designed promotional material, and managed on-site crowd flow for events with 300+ attendees.
activities: Event coordination and execution for university activities
Designed promotional posters for outreach and event visibility
Managed on-site crowd movement for 300+ attendee events
Cross-functional coordination and problem-solving

achievements.title: Large-Scale Event Management
achievements.description: Successfully managed on-site execution and crowd flow for university events with 300+ attendees.

timeline.title: Vice President
timeline.subtitle: Code Vimarsh — The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda
timeline.description: Founded and established Code Vimarsh at The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda — a student-led technical community built from the ground up. Designed the club's complete structure, flow, and working model. Led a team of 11 executives, inaugurated the club with 300–400 student attendees, built an alumni guidance network with professionals from Google, Microsoft, and cybersecurity domains, and conducted sessions on software development and AI. Handed over the club smoothly after graduation.
activities: Founded and designed the full structure and working model of Code Vimarsh
Led a team of 11 club executives
Inaugurated club with 300–400 student attendees
Organized onsite and online Google meetups for industry exposure
Conducted sessions on software development and AI-assisted development
Built alumni network with professionals from Google, Microsoft, and cybersecurity
Managed weekly contests, meetups, and student guidance events
Trained members and handed over the club smoothly after graduation

achievements.title: Founded Code Vimarsh from Scratch
achievements.description: Built and scaled a student-led technical community at MSU with faculty support, alumni funding, and 300–400 students at inauguration.

achievements.title: Alumni Network — Google, Microsoft & Cybersecurity
achievements.description: Built a professional alumni guidance network connecting students with industry professionals from top companies.

timeline.title: Founding Software Developer Engineer (Intern)
timeline.subtitle: Keshav Encon Private Limited — ResumeeAI
timeline.description: Joined Keshav Encon as a Founding Software Developer Engineer during final year (7th and 8th semester), working on ResumeeAI — an AI-based resume builder with ATS checking and live resume sharing. Designed the full system architecture, database schema, RESTful APIs, OAuth 2.0 authentication, and integrated Gemini AI. The project received Best Project recognition from MSU Baroda. Converted to a full-time role (PPO) based on performance and ownership.
activities: Designed system architecture and 50+ table normalized database schema
Developed RESTful APIs for core application functionality
Implemented OAuth 2.0 (Google & LinkedIn) from scratch without third-party libraries
Built JWT-based authorization and backend middleware for API security
Integrated Gemini AI API for AI-powered resume generation
Worked across Node.js, Express.js, React.js, MSSQL, Sequelize ORM, Redux, Tailwind CSS
Supported AWS deployment across EC2, RDS, S3, ELB, and CloudFront

achievements.title: Best Final Year Project — ResumeeAI
achievements.description: ResumeeAI received Best Project recognition from The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda.

achievements.title: PPO — Converted to Full-Time Founding Engineer
achievements.description: Internship converted to a full-time Founding Software Developer Engineer role based on performance and ownership of the product.

timeline.title: Founding Software Developer Engineer
timeline.subtitle: Keshav Encon Private Limited — ResumeeAI, TalentPulseAI, UninestAI
timeline.description: Working full-time as a Founding Software Developer Engineer at Keshav Encon, building and scaling three AI-driven products: ResumeeAI, TalentPulseAI, and UninestAI. Responsibilities span backend architecture, AI integration, scalable database design, REST API development, and production deployments on AWS. Key achievements include eliminating Gemini API costs by 100% via a locally fine-tuned Mistral-7B model, improving query performance by 30%, and automating 80% of manual content creation with a Gemini-powered module.
activities: Fine-tuned Mistral-7B on 45,000+ resumes — eliminated 100% of Gemini API cost
Reduced AI response time from 30s to 20s on NVIDIA GPU infrastructure
Designed 50+ normalized table schemas for TalentPulseAI and UninestAI
Developed 100+ REST APIs across TalentPulseAI and UninestAI
Improved complex query performance by 30% via hybrid ORM + raw SQL approach
Built Gemini-powered question generation automating 80% of manual content creation
Built transaction-safe Stored Procedure framework for UninestAI
Implemented OAuth 2.0, JWT, and RBAC across all platforms
Created comprehensive Swagger documentation for cross-team efficiency
Deployed systems on Firebase, AWS EC2, and AWS RDS

achievements.title: 100% Gemini API Cost Eliminated
achievements.description: Fine-tuned a local Mistral-7B model on 45,000+ resumes, replacing the external Gemini API entirely and reducing AI response time from 30s to 20s.

achievements.title: 30% Query Performance Improvement
achievements.description: Improved complex query execution time by 30% on TalentPulseAI using a hybrid ORM + raw SQL approach across 50+ normalized tables.

achievements.title: 80% Manual Content Creation Automated
achievements.description: Built a Gemini-powered question generation module for TalentPulseAI that automated 80% of manual assessment content creation, reducing preparation time from hours to minutes.
